x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Hardware asset volume determines the breadth of Now Assist HAM AI analysis. Without sufficient asset records, AI refresh recommendations and lifecycle insights are limited in scope and reliability.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("alm_hardware"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total >= 500) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: total + " hardware assets. Now Assist HAM has sufficient asset data for AI-powered lifecycle analysis and refresh recommendations." }; } else if (total >= 100) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: "Only " + total + " hardware assets (target: 500+). Now Assist HAM AI analysis will have limited coverage across the hardware estate." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: "Only " + total + " hardware assets. Insufficient data for meaningful Now Assist HAM AI lifecycle recommendations." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure all hardware assets are tracked in ServiceNow. Import asset records from existing asset repositories or enable Discovery to automatically populate hardware asset records.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851ccc
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Hardware asset volume determines the breadth of Now Assist HAM AI analysis. Without sufficient asset records, AI refresh recommendations and lifecycle insights are limited in scope and reliability.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Hardware Asset Volume</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("alm_hardware"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var total = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total >= 500) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: total + " hardware assets. Now Assist HAM has sufficient asset data for AI-powered lifecycle analysis and refresh recommendations." }; } else if (total >= 100) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: "Only " + total + " hardware assets (target: 500+). Now Assist HAM AI analysis will have limited coverage across the hardware estate." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: total + " hardware asset records", finding: "Only " + total + " hardware assets. Insufficient data for meaningful Now Assist HAM AI lifecycle recommendations." }; } })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>HAM</module> <number>CHK0006234</number> <order>200</order> <remediation_guidance>Ensure all hardware assets are tracked in ServiceNow. Import asset records from existing asset repositories or enable Discovery to automatically populate hardware asset records.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851ccc</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
